name: Revani (Semolina Cake)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, sift together the flour and baking powder.
2. Add the semolina or farina and mix well.
3. Beat the egg yolks in another bowl, then add sugar, olive oil, lemon zest, almond extract, orange juice, vinegar, and cream of tartar. Mix until smooth.
4. Gradually incorporate the dry ingredients into the wet mixture.
5. Stir in the almonds.
6. Pour the batter into a greased baking dish.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 180°C (350°F) for about 30-35 minutes, or until golden brown and firm to the touch.
8. Turn off the oven and let it cool on a rack.
